name: OpenBuild
fullText:
300+ builders showed up for our OpenClaw Shenzhen meetup.This is exactly where we are: noisy, chaotic, and moving too fast to sit down.
Thanks to everyone who squeezed in. The real question isn't how to deploy 🦞it's what you'll build with it. https://t.co/axbSZaOwP8

name: Solana
fullText:
.@Sunrise_DeFi is showing that every token launch belongs onchain.

Sunrise takes non-native assets and lists them to Solana with liquidity from minute one. https://t.co/7puIObfA5r
